raw_title: Building Legislative Legitimacy of “Fake News” Laws: A Study of How Governments May Seek to Legitimize Policy Interventions Against Fake News
title_en: Building Legislative Legitimacy of “Fake News” Laws: A Study of How Governments May Seek to Legitimize Policy Interventions Against Fake News
title_zh: 构建“假新闻”法律的立法合法性：政府如何寻求合法化打击假新闻政策干预的研究
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了政府如何通过法律手段来打击假新闻，并让这些法律看起来合理合法。研究者分析了政府可能采取的策略，使公众接受这些针对假新闻的政策干预。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how governments create laws to combat fake news and make these laws appear legitimate. The research analyzes strategies governments might use to gain public acceptance for policy interventions against fake news.
research_direction_zh: 该研究属于政治传播与媒体监管交叉领域，关注政府如何通过立法手段应对数字时代的虚假信息问题，并探讨政策合法性的构建机制。
research_direction_en: This research falls within the intersection of political communication and media regulation, focusing on how governments use legislative approaches to address disinformation in the digital age and explore mechanisms for building policy legitimacy.
